title: Course: COSC 320 - Algorithm Design and Analysis
description: Focuses on algorithm design and analysis methods. Topics include asymptotic complexity, divide and conquer, dynamic programming, greedy algorithms, graph algorithms, NP-hard and NP-complete problems, and approximation algorithms.
prerequisites_text: COSC 220 and COSC 281, both completed with grades of C or higher
content:
COSC 320 - Algorithm Design and Analysis
Credits: 3
Prerequisites: COSC 220 and COSC 281, both completed with grades of C or higher
Offered: As Needed

Description: Focuses on algorithm design and analysis methods. Topics include asymptotic complexity, divide and conquer, dynamic programming, greedy algorithms, graph algorithms, NP-hard and NP-complete problems, and approximation algorithms.

Curriculum role:
  - BS Computer Science: Group B
  - BS Cloud Computing: Group B

Catalog page: https://catalog.morgan.edu/preview_course_nopop.php?catoid=26&coid=57146
